description: Occult ritual master who weaponizes sigils, blood marks, curses, and forbidden ceremony.

presentation.headline: Occult ritual master who builds pressure through rites, sigils, and cursed ceremony.
presentation.fantasy_hook: Preparation, symbols, and blood-fed pacing make the Ritualist feel deliberate instead of merely dark.
presentation.identity_summary: The Ritualist leans into preparation, symbols, and controlled magical pressure instead of pure speed. Even before deeper ritual systems arrive, the character should read as an occult specialist rather than a generic dark caster.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills build a ritual damage buff that supports steady ceremonial pressure and sets up later mark-and-pulse mechanics.
strengths: Future ritual systems have clear space to grow
tradeoffs: Less immediate burst than direct tempo builds
Preparation-heavy pacing asks for cleaner setup
